title: Growth and decrease (Klee #15) — breathing stroke field

rule.concept: Wachsen und Abnehmen (growth and decrease): a breathing progression that swells then shrinks, turning repetition into life.
rule.note: First KLEE-SOURCED round (concept from Klee himself, not a LeWitt instruction) — the user asked to move to 'something new from Paul Klee'.

restrictions: New `growthField` generator: a field of organic hand-drawn CURVED strokes (comma-like marks) covering the wall evenly, with each stroke's SIZE breathing along an axis (or radially) — small -> swelling to a crest -> shrinking away, so repetition becomes a living tonal wave. Built on the proven winners: kin to the round-11 stroke field, kept FILLED (not sparse — R26 lesson), organic/curved (not hatched — R27), open enough to read (not mud). Monochrome; hand-made. The 16 span growth AXIS (vertical/horizontal/diagonal/radial), crest position & breadth, stroke density & size, stroke curl, and orientation variety.
